title: Fix Drop GPS + OneWay/RoundTrip logic in Customer booking form

requirements.text: In the customer booking form (RideRequestForm.tsx / CustomerDashboard.tsx), when trip type is One Way: show Drop fields normally and add a 'Drop Location Mode: Manual | GPS' toggle with identical UX to the existing Pickup Location Mode toggle.

quotes: One Way: Pickup and Drop are different. Show Drop fields normally AND add "Drop Location Mode: Manual | GPS" (same UX as Pickup).

acceptanceCriteria: When trip type is One Way, a 'Drop Location Mode' toggle (Manual / GPS) is visible beneath the Drop fields.
The toggle design and behavior matches the existing Pickup Location Mode toggle exactly.
Selecting Manual leaves Drop Area and Drop Pincode inputs editable.

requirements.text: When Drop Location Mode is set to GPS (One Way only): capture the device geolocation, store latitude and longitude into the drop location state, and reuse the existing GPS-to-area/pincode helper (already used by Pickup GPS) to auto-fill Drop Area and Drop Pincode fields.

quotes: When Drop mode = GPS, capture geolocation and store into drop location state: latitude and longitude. Keep Drop Area + Drop Pincode inputs available. If the project already has a helper used by Pickup GPS to fill area/pincode, reuse it for Drop GPS too.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking GPS in the Drop Location Mode toggle triggers browser geolocation capture.
Captured latitude and longitude are stored in drop location state.
The same helper function used by Pickup GPS fills Drop Area and Drop Pincode from the captured coordinates.
Drop Area and Drop Pincode inputs remain visible and editable after GPS fill.

requirements.text: When trip type is Round Trip: disable or hide all Drop input fields, automatically set drop location state equal to pickup location state, and display the helper text 'Round trip: Drop location is same as Pickup.' On form submit, map dropoffLocation to pickupLocation.

quotes: Round Trip: Pickup and Drop are same. Disable or hide Drop inputs and automatically set drop location = pickup location. Show helper text "Round trip: Drop location is same as Pickup."

acceptanceCriteria: When trip type is Round Trip, all Drop input fields are disabled or hidden.
Drop location state is automatically synchronized to equal pickup location state.
Helper text 'Round trip: Drop location is same as Pickup.' is displayed.
On form submit, dropoffLocation is set to pickupLocation value.
Trip creation succeeds with Round Trip selection.

requirements.text: When trip type is One Way, on form submit map dropoffLocation to the captured/entered drop location state (dropLocation). Ensure no console.log statements are added and no auth/flicker regressions are introduced.

quotes: No flicker/auth changes. No console logs added.

acceptanceCriteria: On One Way submission, dropoffLocation is populated from dropLocation state (not pickupLocation).
No new console.log statements are present in modified files.
Auth state, login/logout flow, and health check banner behavior are unaffected.

constraints: Only touch frontend/src/components/RideRequestForm.tsx, frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx, and any shared location/GPS helper utility already used by Pickup GPS. No other files.
Do NOT touch auth hooks, routing, role selection, driver pages, admin pages, pricing tab, or backend/main.mo.
Do not add any console.log statements.
Do not introduce any auth or flicker regressions.
No backend changes of any kind.
nonGoals: Pricing calculation or fare estimation changes.
Driver dashboard or admin dashboard changes.
Auth, login/logout, or health check banner fixes.
Any component or hook outside the customer booking form and shared GPS location helper.
